description_long: This object consists of a row of five distinct bungalow-style residential buildings, each set on a rectangular green base that resembles a manicured lawn or plot. The bungalows feature low-pitched, overhanging roofs, with visible eaves and a variety of roof shapes, including gable and hip styles. The exteriors are rendered in earthy tones, with brown and beige roofs, and walls in shades of brown and tan, suggesting wood or brick construction. Each bungalow has prominent windows and doors, some with small porches or entryways, and the arrangement is linear, as if representing a small neighborhood or housing development. The base is flat and green, simulating grass, and each house is separated by a small buffer of space. The overall appearance is orderly and suburban, with each bungalow displaying unique architectural details while maintaining a cohesive style.
description: A row of five distinct bungalow houses on a green rectangular base, each with low-pitched roofs, visible windows, and earthy exterior colors, arranged as in a suburban neighborhood.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five bungalows lined up side by side, highlighting their unique roof shapes and front facades.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of each bungalow and the linear arrangement along the green base.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back sides of the bungalows, with rooflines and rear facades visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the bungalows and the consistent spacing between them.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
